zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Pierrepont於1317年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特時，她的父親Sir Robert de Pierrepont55歲，母親Sarah Heriz28歲。她於大約1330年與Sir Gervais Clifton在英國英格蘭德比夏爾素斯 文費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1346年在英國諾廷加姆爾享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pierrepont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Pierrepont was born in 1317, in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Robert de Pierrepont, was 55 and her mother, Sarah Heriz, was 28. She married Sir Gervais Clifton about 1330, in South Wingfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1346, in Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Pierrepont est née en 1317, à Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert de Pierrepont, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Sarah Heriz, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gervais Clifton environ 1330, à South Wingfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1346, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Pierrepontが1317年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホールメ ピエレプオントで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Pierrepontは55歳，母Sarah Herizは28歳であった。約1330年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアソウス ウィングフィールドでSir Gervais Cliftonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1346年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Pierrepont(이)가 1317년 영국 노틴그함실르 홀 피레폰트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Pierrepont(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Heriz(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 소우스 윙필드에서 Sir Gervais Clifton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1346년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Pierrepont родилась в 1317 г. в местности холм пьиррепонт, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Pierrepont было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Heriz, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gervais Clifton около 1330 г. в местности соут вингфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1346 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.
